files.name: StaminaController
files.source:
local stamina = 100
local max = 100
local running = false

local UIS = game:GetService('UserInputService')

UIS.InputBegan:Connect(function(i)
 if i.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift then running = true end
end)

UIS.InputEnded:Connect(function(i)
 if i.KeyCode == Enum.KeyCode.LeftShift then running = false end
end)

while task.wait(0.1) do
 if running then stamina = math.max(0, stamina - 2) else stamina = math.min(max, stamina + 1) end
end
